patches.rationale: WIN-014 is the China SG null (verdict: Misleading). SAA field strength corresponds to WIN-035 (SAA African < 21,795 nT, verdict: Std Model Explains). Verified against wins.json. ISS-1534.

patches.find: This cartographic convergence is equally compatible with a spherical earth
patches.replace: It is also equally compatible with a spherical earth
patches.rationale: Remove stutter: two consecutive sentences began with identical 5-word phrase 'This cartographic convergence is'. Lowest-touch fix per curmudgeon c7 recommendation. ISS-1535.

patches.find: the paper appeared in 2001, five years after the eclipse
patches.replace: the paper appeared in 2001, two years after the eclipse
patches.rationale: Arithmetic error: 2001 - 1999 = 2 years, not 5. The 5-year figure conflated eclipse-to-paper (2 years) with paper-to-dome-model (~5 years). detail_verdict_text correctly uses 'five years before the dome model existed' for the latter interval. ISS-1538.
